# BP-126 negative: the transaction has a visible commit path.
lang: go
file: BP-126-safe.go
variant: database-sql
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
)

func update(db *sql.DB) error {
	tx, err := db.Begin()
	if err == nil {
		if err = tx.Commit(); err == nil {
			return nil
		}
	}
	return fmt.Errorf("transaction: %w", err)
}
